item.title: Takeaways From The Times’s Look Inside D.H.S.
item.description: Eighty current and former employees talked to us about the Trump administration’s relentless push for mass deportations.

item.title: ‘I Don’t Know If We Can Come Back From This’: The View From Inside Trump’s D.H.S.
item.description: Dozens of agents and officials share their stories about working in the Department of Homeland Security during the harsh crackdown on illegal immigration.

item.title: We Don’t Really Know How A.I. Works. That’s a Problem.
item.description: For us to trust it on certain subjects, researchers in the growing field of interpretability might need to learn how to open the black box of its brain.

item.title: My Longtime Housekeeper’s Work Is Slipping. What Should I Do?
item.description: We know she depends on this income, and we have hesitated to raise the issue with her.

item.title: Should You Procrastinate Productively — or by Having Fun?
item.description: A ruling on a dispute over the proper method of avoidance.

item.title: Do You Have to Make Pour-Over Coffee for Your Spouse?
item.description: A ruling on a dispute over a tedious cup of coffee.

item.title: Bob Odenkirk Would Like to Remind You That Life Is a Meaningless Farce
item.description: The actor and comedian is keenly aware of humanity’s limitations, but he’s not giving up.

item.title: The Generations Fantasizing About Boring Office Jobs
item.description: “Day in my life” videos filmed at corporate offices fetishize white-collar minutiae. But they reveal something deeper.

item.title: I Had an Affair With My Friend’s Wife. Should I Tell Him?
item.description: I didn’t even know he was married, let alone to her.

item.title: How Well Will You Age? Take Our Quiz.
item.description: The little daily decisions we make add up — and ultimately shape our longevity.

item.title: The Rich and Powerful Want to Live Forever. What if They Could?
item.description: From the Kremlin to Silicon Valley, some of the most powerful people in the world now want something more: eternal life.
